# optionOnScreenOnly | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Graphics ](/documentation/coregraphics)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

- [ optionOnScreenOnly ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption/optiononscreenonly)

- [ CGWindowListOption ](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption)

-  optionOnScreenOnly 

Type Property# optionOnScreenOnly

Mac CatalystmacOS

```
static var optionOnScreenOnly: CGWindowListOption { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coregraphics/cgwindowlistoption/optiononscreenonly#Discussion)

List all windows that are currently onscreen. Windows are returned in order from front to back. When retrieving a list with this option, the `relativeToWindow` parameter should be set to [`kCGNullWindowID`](/documentation/coregraphics/kcgnullwindowid).
